title: Study of the utility and impact of a plasma p‐tau181 Alzheimer's biomarker (SUITABLE)
authors: Kyra O'Brien; C. Coykendall; K. Harkins; Xingmei Wang; Abigail Perelman; Megan Zhang; Jason Karlawish
journal: Alzheimer's & Dementia : Translational Research & Clinical Interventions
abstract: Blood‐based Alzheimer's disease (AD) biomarkers are increasingly used in clinical care, but there are few real‐world studies of their clinical utility. We evaluated the impact of plasma phosphorylated tau at threonine 181 (p‐tau181) on the diagnosis and management of patients with cognitive impairment in a memory clinic.
